Highly Recommended place for foodies, If you are looking for authentic Karachi desi food with late-night vibes, then Tayyabi'z Restaurant۔ طیبیز ریسٹورنٹ in Hussainabad Food Street is definitely worth trying. Famous for its traditional Katakat, BBQ, karahi, fried rice, and zinger rolls, this restaurant has been serving food lovers in Karachi Hussainabad. The restaurant has a lively Karachi food street atmosphere with indoor family seating and air-conditioned sections. The environment is energetic, especially during weekends and late-night hours. Parking can sometimes be difficult because Hussainabad remains crowded most evenings. Tayyabiz is especially known for: Katakat Balochi Tikka Fried Rice Zinger Roll Karahi BBQ items
Too much noise bikes and running around you while you are eating.

Everything I’ve tried from Kababjees so far has never disappointed me even Majesty is my favorite. But this “premium water” they’re serving just feels like regular RO water, and honestly it’s quite disappointing. I think Kababjees really needs to work on this.

I have been coming to Tayyabiz Restaurant for the last 5 years. Their food is always excellent, and their service is outstanding. The staff and management team are also very cooperative and professional. 5 stars from my side — Excellent 👍🏻
Highly recommend.. staff, atmosphere,food quality all good.

I am writing to lodge a serious and formal complaint regarding an extremely disturbing experience my family and I had at your Five Star branch. During our visit, we ordered Alfredo pasta, and to our absolute shock, we discovered a dead fly inside the dish. This is not just disappointing it is completely unacceptable and reflects a severe failure in your hygiene and food safety standards. Such negligence poses a direct risk to customers' health and demonstrates a lack of basic quality control. An incident like this raises serious concerns about how food is prepared, handled, and served at your establishment. This experience has not only ruined our trust in your brand but also left us deeply dissatisfied and concerned. I expect immediate attention to this matter, a thorough investigation, and a clear explanation of how such a serious lapse occurred. Furthermore, I urge your management to take strict corrective actions to ensure that such incidents never happen again. If this issue is not addressed appropriately, I will be compelled to escalate the matter further. Sincerely, Syed Wasif hussain

Arey Bhee, 🤮🤢 I just now visited House of Kababjees, and honestly, it was extremely disappointing. The food quality was very poor, and the service was just as bad. You can eat from roadside carts many times without any issues, you will be fit. But every single time I’ve had food from here, it has affected my health. I even gave it another chance hoping things would improve—but unfortunately, the result was the same… ended up feeling sick again. The oil quality, meat, and overall standards seem very low. Whatever your personal stance is, one thing is clear—health should never be compromised. Paise esy lety hain jesy International Brand hai... Quality esi dety hain jesy Selani Waly free me khilaaa rhy hain... I hope wo is se acha khilaty hongy ..

Delivery isn’t the best option if you’re planning to get this because I live less than 5 mins drive away and the food arrives mild to cold everytime. The chicken, contrary to most opinions is good for the price. Their burgers and wraps are definitely the best items on the menu. I think people overhyped it and then when it didn’t meet their expectations they hated on it. They have recently done a lot of innovation with their menu, which has actually produced good results in the past, so let’s see. Oh, and btw, their Albaik sauce is ON POINT.

I recently visited Drip Coffee Bakery Kitchen and had a wonderful experience. I tried their Tiramisu Latte, Banana Bread, and Kunafa Tart. The Banana Bread and Kunafa Tart were the highlights of my visit. Both were fresh, flavorful, and perfectly prepared. The Kunafa Tart had a great balance of sweetness and texture, while the Banana Bread was soft, moist, and incredibly satisfying. The Tiramisu Latte was also very good, with a rich coffee flavor and a nice tiramisu-inspired taste. It was slightly stronger than I expected, but coffee lovers who enjoy a bold flavor will definitely appreciate it. The ambiance was amazing, cozy, comfortable, and perfect for relaxing or catching up with friends. The staff was friendly, cooperative, and attentive throughout the visit, which made the experience even better. Overall, Drip Coffee Bakery Kitchen offers great food, quality coffee, and a welcoming atmosphere. I would definitely recommend trying their Banana Bread and Kunafa Tart, and I’ll be visiting again soon.

Assalam o Alaikum WRB, I visited there after a long time on my son's recommendation around 7 o'clock in the morning. I ordered beef Nihari, chicken Nihari, Chana, Sheermal, etc. I was surprised when I heard that Lassi and tea were not available, which are major parts of Lahori Nashta. If those two items are not ready at that time, then why do they open the shop early? They should prepare the entire menu and then allow customers for breakfast. The atmosphere was good at that time because no customers were there. A sales tax invoice was also not available. I am sharing a picture of that invoice. I have seen many customers share their feedback, but the owner/admin only sends an auto-response instead of addressing their concerns. “Extraction Coffee – لاہور کی سپشلٹی کافی کی دنیا، جہاں ہر گھونٹ تازہ، طازہ اور مکمل ذائقہ لے کر آتا ہے۔” “لاہور کی پریمیم سپشلٹی کافی: Extraction Coffee میں ہر کپ کے لیے بہترین بینز، بہترین بریونگ اور بہترین تجربہ۔” “Extraction Coffee, Lahore: جہاں کافی صرف مشروب نہیں، ایک کلچر ہے۔” Extraction Coffee Lahore ایک پریمیم سپشلٹی کافی کیفے اور روسٹری ہے جو لاہور کے شہریوں کو عالمی معیار کی تازہ دم روسٹڈ کافی فراہم کرتی ہے۔ چاہے آپ ہلکی سی ایسپرسو، دلکش لیٹے آرٹ، یا صاف اور صاف سائپنگ پور اوورز کے لیے ہوں، Extraction کی ہر ڈرپ، ہر کپ اور ہر گھاس کی باری کافی میں ایکستریکشن کی ماہرانہ تشکیک کا نتیجہ ہے۔ یہاں کافی کو صرف مشروب کے طور پر نہیں بلکہ ایک سنجیدہ کلچر اور تخلیقی تجربہ سمجھا جاتا ہے، جس کے لیے آپ لوئر (Gulberg, DHA, Cantonment) جیسے اہم علاقوں میں Extraction کے دکھلے یا اسٹائلش کیفے میں دوستوں کے ساتھ وقت گزار سکتے ہیں۔ Extraction Coffee Lahore – سپشلٹی کافی، کیفے اور روسٹری یہاں آپ کو تازہ روسٹڈ اور ہاتھ سے ڈرِپ کی گئی سپشلٹی کافی، ہلکی ایسپرسو بلینڈز، دلکش لیٹے آرٹ مشروبات، اور کلاسک ہاٹ / آئس کافی ملیں گی۔ لاہور کے پریمیم کافی پیسندوں کے لیے Gulberg، DHA Phase‑3 / 5 / 6، اور Cantonment جیسے مقامات پر موجود Extraction Coffee ایک ایسا ہب ہے جہاں آپ کمیونٹی، کریٹیویٹی اور عمدہ کافی کے ساتھ وقت گزار سکتے ہیں۔

Sucré Coffee Lahore ایک خوبصورت اور آرام دہ کیفے ہے جہاں خوشبودار کافی، مزیدار ڈیسرٹس اور دلکش ماحول ایک ساتھ ملتے ہیں۔ یہ جگہ دوستوں کے ساتھ بیٹھنے، تنہائی میں coffee enjoy کرنے یا کسی خاص ملاقات کے لیے بہترین انتخاب ہے۔ لاہور میں Sucré Coffee ان لوگوں کے لیے ایک مثالی جگہ ہے جو ذائقے، معیار اور خوبصورتی کو ایک ساتھ پسند کرتے ہیں۔ یہاں ہر کپ کافی اور ہر dessert میں ایک خاص نفاست محسوس ہوتی ہے، جبکہ café کا ماحول اسے مزید یادگار بنا دیتا ہے۔ Sucré Coffee Lahore — جہاں ہر sip میں سکون، ہر bite میں لذت اور ہر corner میں ایک aesthetic vibe ملتی ہے۔ اگر آپ لاہور میں ایک cozy coffee spot ڈھونڈ رہے ہیں تو یہ جگہ ضرور لاہور کا Sucré Coffee ایک ایسا کیفے ہے جو اپنی stylish ambiance، freshly prepared coffee اور delicious desserts کی وجہ سے نمایاں ہے۔ یہ جگہ نہ صرف coffee lovers کے لیے پسندیدہ بن سکتی ہے بلکہ ان لوگوں کے لیے بھی بہترین ہے جو ایک classy اور آرام دہ بیٹھک چاہتے ہیں۔

Drip Coffee Kitchen Lahore میں بہترین دستکاری کافی، تازہ بیکڈ آئٹمز اور آرام دہ ماحول۔ لوکل بینز اور جدید بروئنگ تکنیک کے ساتھ ہر کپ میں خالص ذائقہ۔ Drip Coffee Kitchen Lahore: لاہور کے دل میں ایک جدید کافی شاپ جہاں ہم خاص طریقے سے بروئنگ کی جانے والی کافی، ہینڈ میڈ بیکریز اور آرام دہ بیٹھنے کی جگہ فراہم کرتے ہیں۔ ہماری کافی مقامی اور عالمی نمونوں کے بیچ بہترین امتزاج ہے—ہر کپ میں معیار اور محبت۔ ورکنگ میٹنگ، دوستوں کے ساتھ ملاقات یا تنہا ریلیکس کرنے کے لیے بہترین خوش آمدید Drip Coffee Kitchen Lahore — جہاں ہر قطرہ کافی کا سفر کہانی سناتا ہے۔ ہم مقامی کسانوں سے منتخب شدہ بینز کا استعمال کرتے ہیں جنہیں ماہر بارسٹاز ہاتھ سے بھون کر مخصوص درجہ حرارت اور ڈِرپ (pour-over) یا ایسپریسو تکنیک سے تیار کرتے ہیں۔ مینو میں کلاسک کافی، سائنچر فلٹر ڈِرپ کافی، الگ الگ سیزنل بلبز، کم کیفین آپشنز اور خاص ہاؤس بلینز شامل ہیں۔ ساتھ میں تازہ بیکڈ کروسانٹس، کیک اور ہلکے نمکین بھی دستیاب ہیں۔ آرام دہ انٹیریئر، فاسٹ وائی فائی اور دوستانہ عملہ Drip کو کام، گفتگو اور تخلیقی سوچ کے لیے بہترین بناتے ہیں۔ آئیں، ایک کپ لے کر لاہور کی مسرت میں شامل ہوں۔ چند متبادل چھوٹے ٹیکسٹ (CTA اور پوسٹس کے لیے) "آج ہی Drip میں آکر اپنی پسندیدہ ڈِرپ کافی آزمائیں — ہر کپ میں پنہاں کہانی۔" "ہمارے سیزنل بینز ابھی دستیاب ہیں — محدود مقدار، فوری چکھیں!" "آرام، ذائقہ، اور معیاری کافی — Drip Coffee Kitchen Lahore میں

Discovered this place thru a friend recommendation. It's housed in an unassuming basement. Small, no frills place with only four tables. However. It's a BBQ lover's heaven. We tried their beef Undercut boti, beef kebab and beef behari. Their beef behari was handsdown the best we had in Lahore so far. Beef Undercut boti was also really good. Their paratha & roti were a let down though.

I recently visited Coffee Wagera at Gulberg Galleria and loved the taste of coffee.

Coffee Wagera has quickly become one of my favorite new spots, and for good reason and now they are open Gulberg Galleria. The concept behind the brand is refreshing—focused on delivering quality coffee with a casual, approachable vibe that makes you want to linger a little longer. During my visit, I tried their Caramel Latte and the Brownie dessert, and both were outstanding. The Caramel Latte struck the perfect balance between smooth espresso, steamed milk, and that rich caramel sweetness without being overpowering. The Molten Lava was equally impressive—warm, indulgent, and with a gooey center that made for a perfect ending. What stood out most was the consistency in both flavor and presentation. Everything felt thoughtfully prepared, and the service matched the quality of the food and drinks. It’s clear that a lot of care has gone into building this venture. If you’re in the area and looking for great coffee and desserts in a relaxed setting, I’d highly recommend giving Coffee Wagera a try.
It was a good experience 😁 the taste is amazing 😍😋😋

Courtyard Grill لاہور میں بی بی کیو اور گرلڈ فائن ڈائننگ کا شاندار تجربہ ہے۔ یہاں ہر ڈش خاص میرینیشن، بہترین گریوی اور لاجواب ذائقے کے ساتھ تیار کی جاتی ہے، جس سے ہر لقمہ یادگار بن جاتا اگر آپ لاہور میں خالص اور مزیدار BBQ تلاش کر رہے ہیں تو Courtyard Grill بہترین انتخاب ہے۔ یہاں کے juicy kababs, undercut tikka اور grilled items اپنے منفرد ذائقے اور اعلیٰ معیار کی وجہ سے بہت پسند کیے جاتے Courtyard Grill لاہور ان لوگوں کے لیے ایک بہترین جگہ ہے جو معیاری گوشت، شاندار grilling اور بھرپور ذائقے سے محبت کرتے ہیں۔ یہاں کا ہر کھانا تازگی اور perfection کے ساتھ پیش کیا جاتا لاہور کے بہترین BBQ spots میں شمار ہونے والا Courtyard Grill اپنے خاص ذائقے، خوبصورت ماحول اور دلکش presentation کے لیے مشہور ہے۔ یہ جگہ فیملی ڈنر، دوستوں کے ساتھ ملاقات اور خاص مواقع کے لیے بہترین Courtyard Grill لاہور میں وہ مزہ ملتا ہے جو ہر BBQ lover ڈھونڈتا ہے۔ نرم و رسیلا گوشت، شاندار spice mix اور fresh grilling technique اس ریسٹورنٹ کو لاہور کے نمایاں فوڈ پوائنٹس میں شامل کرتی ہے۔

The ice cream is great. However, just like any other outlet, if you leave it to unskilled people to run it, you will see your repute go down. The other day I went in to buy ice cream which happens to be my second time in two weeks, and I realized that the guy behind the counter would insist that I pay in cash (even the first time). However, I paid via credit card and found there was a significant difference in the amount being charged via cash vs. credit card. I cannot understand as to why an outlet would push the client to pay cash when the credit card option is more cost effective. Also, it would be great for consumer confidence if the rates of all the things in the shop are displayed. I hope the owner would follow through on improving these points.

The ambiance is perfect for relaxing and enjoying a great meal. What impressed me the most was the staff — everyone was extremely friendly, respectful, and cooperative. My second visit to Deejos with my sisters was extremely disappointing and nothing like my first experience. The staff was rude, unresponsive, and showed little concern for customers. The air-conditioning was poor, and despite repeated requests, they simply turned it off and opened the windows, which was unacceptable. The food quality was also below standard. The nachos were made with samosa patti instead of proper tortilla chips, and the “baked” pasta was not baked at all—after we complained, they just added cheese on top, microwaved it, and served it again. Overall, a very poor and frustrating experience.
Best Place for spend with Friend & Family

This place was honestly a complete mess. The restaurant itself didn’t even look clean, tables were not properly wiped and the whole environment felt very unhygienic. The washroom was even worse, which already gave a bad impression. The food portions were very small compared to the prices, and the taste was pathetic and even the panini sandwich was very smelly although it was of chicken but when we told the manager he says it's not. Your nose is sensitive. He's being extremely rude to us that he purposely ignored us just because me n my friends were wearing abaya. He judged us and looked down to us. On top of that, there was a long delay in serving even simple items. No proper management, no coordination, and everything felt disorganized. Overall, a very disappointing and frustrating experience, definitely not worth the money at all.

This is primarily a roadside cafe for quick tea, coffee, and snacks, so I was pleasantly surprised by the variety they offer. We tried several items, and most were good. The staff is courteous and friendly, and the environment is particularly nice in the evening. What we tried: · Club sandwich – 10/10 Classic taste. · Zinger burger – 7/10 The crumb was a bit hard. The restaurant should improve this. · Nutella paratha – 9/10 · Chocolate shake – 10/10

Wonderful cafe in an urban setting, with beautiful decor of umbrellas and a cozy outside sitting. Staff are just wonderful and super supportive, and the food in itself was delicious — a nice spot to chat with friends and others. Would come again!
Shit shisha, and horrible drinks. Bawqas vibe. Save your money. 5000PKR for 1 shisha & 2 mojit drinks and a 250PKR service charge.

It's fantastic experience .very delicious food and sheesha

I honestly regret going to Coco Cafe. It was a complete waste of time and money. The food is absolutely terrible—bland, tasteless, and not worth even trying. I strongly recommend staying away from their meals. The washroom situation was even worse. It was dirty, with wet tissue papers everywhere and very poor hygiene. It felt extremely uncomfortable. The only decent things were the sheesha and the waiters’ service, but that’s nowhere near enough to make up for everything else. The rooftop view and weather are nice, but that’s literally the only positive. Overall, I felt completely scammed. Definitely not coming back.

Had a great experience at Chai O Clock! The tea was rich in flavor and perfectly brewed. The ambiance is cozy and relaxing, making it a perfect spot to hang out with friends. The staff was friendly and service was quick. Highly recommended for chai lovers in Islamabad!
